title: Inbound Update Actor + inbound Move activities
description: Handle inbound Update{Actor} to refresh cached remote actor profiles (display name, bio, avatar URL, public key). Handle inbound Move{Actor} for account migration in: update alsoKnownAs on the moving actor, migrate follow relationships from old actor to new actor, send a Follow to the new actor for each local actor that followed the old one.
design: Update Actor: re-fetch actor document, update remote_accounts row. Move: verify new actor has alsoKnownAs pointing to old actor (required by spec). For each local follow of old actor: create follow of new actor, enqueue Follow activity, remove old follow.
acceptance_criteria: Remote actor updates profile and local cache reflects new display name/bio; Move migrates follower relationships; after Move, outbound posts go to new actor's inbox; alsoKnownAs row created for the old actor URI
